title: Yoga Sutras, Pada 4: Kaivalya — On Liberation
description: The fourth and final pada of Patanjali's Yoga Sutras: on absolute liberation.
introduction: The fourth and final pada of Patanjali's Yoga Sutras: on absolute liberation.

translation.text: When the mind is free from the coloring of the three gunas, the experiencer rests in its own nature. This is liberation.
